name: claude-bionify
description: Bionic reading for Claude's responses that bolds the leading part of each word to guide your eyes and enable you to read faster.

fixation.title: Fixation strength
fixation.description: Fraction of each word to bold (0.1–0.9). Higher means more bold.

min_word_length.title: Minimum word length
min_word_length.description: Words shorter than this are left unbolded.

boundary.title: Bold boundary
boundary.description: How much of each word to bold: "fraction" uses Fixation strength; "syllable" ends at the first syllable (e.g. stri-ng); "log" grows logarithmically so long words are bolded less.

skip_acronyms.title: Skip acronyms
skip_acronyms.description: Leave ALL-CAPS acronyms like API or JSON unbolded.

protect_urls.title: Protect URLs, paths, and files
protect_urls.description: Don't bold inside URLs, emails, file paths, or filenames.

skip_headings.title: Skip headings
skip_headings.description: Leave markdown headings (lines starting with #) unbolded. Headings are already visually prominent, so bolding inside them adds clutter.
